allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name'],f['type']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for f in d.get\('tree', []\): print\(f['path']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re content = sys.stdin.read\(\) text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', content\) text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\) print\(text[:5000]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['full_name'], '-', i['description']\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
